entities.name: FALL ARMYWORM
entities.description: A pest, Spodoptera frugiperda, targeted for management using actinomycetes metabolites

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: Entomopathogenic bacteria used to produce secondary metabolites for pest control

entities.name: KG-13
entities.description: An effective actinomycetes isolate showing high mortality and chitinase activity against FAW

entities.name: CAI-134
entities.description: An actinomycetes isolate (Nocardiopsis sp.) effective against FAW

entities.name: CAI-17
entities.description: An actinomycetes isolate (Streptomyces albus) causing larval prolongation and pupal intermediates

entities.name: BT VAR. KURSTAKI
entities.description: A biological control agent used for comparison in greenhouse studies

entities.name: BIOPESTICIDES
entities.description: Reliable strategies used to protect crops from pest attacks

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Chemical compounds produced by actinomycetes, including ICM and ECM

entities.name: INTRACELLULAR METABOLITES
entities.description: Metabolites produced inside the cells of actinomycetes

entities.name: EXTRACELLULAR METABOLITES
entities.description: Metabolites secreted outside the cells of actinomycetes

entities.name: MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death of FAW larvae induced by metabolites or pesticides

entities.name: LARVAL PROLONGATION
entities.description: The extension of the larval stage of FAW observed with CAI-17 ECM

entities.name: LARVAL PUPAL INTERMEDIATES
entities.description: Abnormal developmental stages of FAW observed with CAI-17 ECM

entities.name: CHITINASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of actinomycetes to break down chitin, measured by zone of inhibition

entities.name: EMAMECTIN
entities.description: A chemical pesticide used as a comparative control in greenhouse studies

entities.name: DIET IMPREGNATION BIOASSAY
entities.description: A laboratory method used to evaluate the efficacy of metabolites on FAW larvae

entities.name: LABORATORY CONDITIONS
entities.description: Controlled environment where diet impregnation bioassays were conducted

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Semi-controlled environment used to evaluate the efficacy of metabolites and pesticides
